headline: J.P. Morgan Asks Court to Vacate $4.25 Million Award Over Advisor’s Super Bowl Expense
summary: The firm says that an arbitration panel erred in granting any relief to Brent Bodner, whom it says was an at-will employee who could have been fired for any reason, or none at all.

headline: JPMorgan: 2026 rally entirely earnings-driven, bull case targets 8900 by year-end

headline: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) Is Putting Agentic AI To Work In Banking
summary: JPMorgan Chase (NYSE:JPM) is moving to deploy autonomous agentic AI systems across parts of its banking operations. These AI agents are designed to execute transactions and manage workflows with limited human intervention, subject to internal controls and governance. The rollout targets areas such as payments and treasury operations, with implications for automation, risk oversight, and client service models. For investors watching large bank adoption of artificial intelligence, JPMorgan...

headline: Biggest US Home Lender’s Merger Fight Spotlights Its 60% Stock Slide
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Mat Ishbia’s frustration was boiling over. The billionaire chief executive was trying to salvage a deal he described in February as a “strategic inflection point” for his company, United Wholesale Mortgage. After months of back-and-forth — and a steep decline in his own wealth — he didn’t hold back. headline: Aluminum’s War Shock Blunted by Dark Transits and Chinese Supply
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The Iran war caused one of the biggest supply shocks to ever hit the aluminum market, but the runaway price surge that many were bracing for has been blunted by the ingenuity of producers from the Middle East to China.
